name: [fornecer: nome da marca (brand_config.identity.BRAND_NAME)] -- Captacao de Leads (Lead-gen / scraping)
description: Find leads around a seed across the available channels (B2C marketplace, B2B CNPJ, UGC social) -- a typed lead list with per-source honest status (ok / blocked / skipped) and a go/no-go verdict. Never fabricates a contact; seeds the CRM (the leads entity).

skills.name: Captacao de Leads (Lead-gen / scraping)
skills.description: Find leads around a seed across the available channels (B2C marketplace, B2B CNPJ, UGC social) -- a typed lead list with per-source honest status (ok / blocked / skipped) and a go/no-go verdict. Never fabricates a contact; seeds the CRM (the leads entity).
examples: Encontre leads para <perfil> a partir de <seed> -- marketplace, CNPJ, social

_meta.note: A2A AgentCard scoped to ONE CEXAI capability. supportedInterfaces is empty until this agent is deployed behind a URL endpoint.
